title: <asset>.meta.yml
description: Optional sidecar next to a shareable asset. Every field is optional; it exists to override the folder-convention topic/language and to carry a license. See PLAN.md section 5.

topic.description: Overrides the topic implied by the nearest ancestor assets/<topic>/ directory.

license.description: Required, directly or by cascade, for the asset to be admitted into common/. 'none' opts the asset out of pooling.

attribution.description: Free-text attribution line shown in the generated gallery.
